<!-- Generated by the ccode-to-codex mirror sync on 2026-04-14 from input revision 9a2403fb. -->

# Agent Complexity Classifier

Classifies Claude agent definitions into migration tiers for Codex conversion
using only the current input artifact. Do not copy a private repository's
pre-computed agent roster into public guidance.

## Quick Decision Tree

Evaluate top-to-bottom. First match wins.

```text
1. Native .codex/agents/{name}.toml already exists? -> SKIP
2. hooks field present and tools include Write/Edit/MultiEdit? -> Tier 3
3. tools list has 20+ MCP tool entries? -> Tier 3
4. agent orchestrates other agents? -> Tier 3
5. body content > 300 lines? -> Tier 3
6. write tools plus 5+ MCP tools? -> Tier 2
7. initialPrompt field present? -> Tier 2
8. external memory write tools present? -> Tier 2
9. otherwise -> Tier 1
```

## Tier Definitions

| Tier | Name | Output |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Mechanical | Script output plus validation |
| 2 | Assisted | Script output with review annotations |
| 3 | Hand-authored | Skeleton plus manually authored domain sections |
| SKIP | Existing native artifact | Validate only |

## Readiness Score

Start at 100 and subtract penalties for migration risk:

| Signal | Penalty | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| hooks field present | -15 | No per-agent hook equivalent in Codex |
| 20+ MCP tools | -12 | Requires MCP scoping decisions |
| Body > 300 lines | -10 | Needs companion reference extraction |
| Orchestrates other agents | -10 | Delegation lifecycle must be preserved |
| Write tools + many MCP tools | -8 | Complex sandbox and dependency mapping |
| External memory write tools | -6 | Write semantics need review |
| initialPrompt field | -4 | Needs Initial Action conversion |
| permissionMode present | -4 | No per-agent equivalent |
| Any MCP references in body | -3 | Namespace normalization needed |

## Synthetic Examples

| Synthetic agent | Lines | MCP Count | Hooks | Write | Tier | Why |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| read-only-reviewer | 90 | 3 | No | No | 1 | short read-only role |
| notes-maintainer | 180 | 6 | No | external memory | 2 | write semantics need review |
| diagnostics-reader | 160 | 4 | No | No | 2 | command access but no file edits |
| orchestration-lead | 260 | 8 | No | No | 3 | delegates to other agents |
| platform-implementer | 420 | 22 | Yes | Yes | 3 | hooks, many tools, and file edits |

These examples are synthetic fixtures. Replace them with current run output only
inside generated reports, not inside reusable public guidance.

## JSON Output Schema

Assessment output should return one object per agent:

```json
{
  "agent": "<agent_slug>",
  "tier": 3,
  "readiness_score": 62,
  "signals": ["orchestration", "body > 300 lines"],
  "mcp_servers": ["example-server"],
  "hooks_used": false,
  "sandbox_recommendation": "workspace-write"
}
```
